steps.title: Identify the name's role
steps.content: The phrase "lawyer and cycling advocate" needs the name to identify the specific person. Because the name is essential to the subject, it should not be set off with commas.

steps.title: Keep subject and verb together
steps.content: A sets the name off as nonessential. B adds a comma after the name, separating the subject from "has identified." C has an unmatched comma before the name. The no-comma version keeps the essential name in the subject. The answer is D.
